authoritative_source.authority_status: official SNOMED site and MLDS portal reachable; RF2 release access not attempted
authoritative_source.observed_release: not_pinned; no SNOMED CT release payloads downloaded
authoritative_source.version_pinning_strategy: pin by edition, extension, release package name, release date, effectiveTime, RF2 package checksum, license/affiliate terms, and local-only cache manifest after access review

artifact_contract.freshness_rule: refresh probe metadata when SNOMED edition, extension, MLDS route, release package, effectiveTime, license/affiliate terms, cross-map terms, or payload policy changes

fail_fast_probe_design.record_scope: one SNOMED CT source governance record only; no concept, description, relationship, refset, OWL, language, map, or RF2 release rows until license and redistribution terms are cleared
required_outputs: candidate comparison or crosswalk shell when applicable
success_criteria: SNOMED authority, MLDS access gate, edition scope, and license state recorded
payload handling path classified as commit-safe or local-only
review handoff remains candidate-only and human-review-required

human_review_and_llm_policy.llm_output_allowed: metadata and review-assistance only until SNOMED license, MLDS access, edition/extension scope, RF2, and cross-map terms are cleared

telemetry.source_version: official SNOMED site and MLDS portal observed; release version and RF2 payload not downloaded
telemetry.validation_command: pixi run build-ontology-network; pixi run validate-conductor; pixi run validate-ontology-network; pixi run validate-ontology-network-artifacts; pixi run test-conductor-validation; git diff --check
open_blockers: SNOMED CT affiliate/member license review required
MLDS release access and edition scope review required
national extension and language refset terms review required
RF2 redistribution and cross-map terms review required
